name: Edge Assessment Connector
description: Edge Assessment API Template. Use this template to help generate your API contracts so that you can connect with CSOD and become an assessment provider. Detailed in this API are endpoints that should be implemented so that the contract can adhere to Edge  Assessment Provider standards.
